home.headline: Scalable Android Engineering
home.hero_subtitle: Nam Tran, Senior Android Engineer with over 10 years of experience.

about.title: Hello, I'm Nam.
about.text: My approach to Android engineering is rooted in long-term product thinking. I don't just build features; I architect systems that are maintainable, testable, and resilient to change. With a decade in the industry, I have navigated the evolution of the Android framework—from the early days of Java and Eclipse to the modern era of Kotlin Coroutines and Jetpack Compose.
about.text_short: Specializing in high-performance architectures, clean code modularization, and building robust mobile ecosystems that scale with business logic. Deep expertise in memory management, reactive patterns, and modern Android toolsets.
about.feat1_desc: Implementing strict MVVM/MVI patterns to ensure decoupling and testability.
about.feat2_desc: Deep expertise in memory management, leak detection, and frame-rate optimization.

experience.description: Lead technical implementation for core banking features, focusing on secure transaction flows and reactive UI.
Optimized video playback performance and DRM implementation for high-traffic streaming services.
